titleStmt.title: SII 31.212: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 212. (A.R. No. B 208 of 1936.) DŌMALAGUṆḌA (NEAR GAṆḌIGANAMALA), VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the forest about 1.5 k.m., to the north-east of the village.
It is dated in Śaka 1513, (wrong), Śubhakṛit, Āshādha, śu. 11.

It registers the gift of land with tax-free facilities to Pedamalla bhaṭṭlu of Sattenapalle, the son of Kaṁchhābattu and the grand son of Mallabattu of Māruṭla gōtra by Rāmana Tiṁmāreḍḍi, the son of Basvi reḍḍi and the grandson of Mallāreḍḍi of Valluṭla gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyu
dbudaya śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 15
13 Agunēṭi śōbhakṛtu saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 11
lu valluṭla gōtrōdbhavulayina mallāreḍḍigāri pau
tṛluṁnnu baśvireḍḍigāri putṛluṁnnu Ayina
rāmana tiṁmmāreḍḍigāru . māruṭlagōtrōdbhavulaI
mallābattunigāri pautṛluṁnnu kaṁccābattunigāri pu
tṛluṁgārayina sattenapalli pedamallābattuniki yicina bhūdhā
na thammaśāsanaṁ . māku sāgivaci domalaguṁḍu po
laṁlō pūrvāna nīku naḍacivace mānyapu cēni tū¨rpuhala
yallama cēnipaṭṭu tū¨rpuku bōṭikamērānu paḍamaṭiki da
kṣaṇāna guṁ mēragānunu vuttānaku rāllakuṁṭranu yi
catuśravamūnū gallinavi . śiṁgaṁ Ayiduṁ vittalakṣētraṁ
yī tathātithi puṇyakālamaṁdu sahiraṇyōdaka dāna
thārapūrvaṁkaṁgānu thāravōsi yistimigāna mī pu
trapautrapāraṁpadyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāyigā Anu
bhaviṁcci brakēdidviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ .
paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavē¨rtā . yī śāsa
naṁ yavvaru Ā cēśi nānu gaṁgaka¨rttunu gōpubrāṁ
hani caṁppina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru . Īkṣē
tānaku yēmi naḍaci puṇyaṁbu
bhoṁduruvāru . śrī śrī śrī śrī jēyanu .
Digital edition of SII 31.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
